annotation.report: Operator log: The noncritical ventilation damper actuator started moving on command but stopped before reaching the requested position under event reference 7878. The redundant ventilation path remained available, process conditions stayed within normal limits, and the affected actuator was removed from automatic service. Routine maintenance is appropriate.
evidence: The noncritical ventilation damper actuator stopped before reaching the requested position under event reference 7878.
The redundant ventilation path remained available and process conditions stayed within normal limits.
The affected actuator was removed from automatic service, and routine maintenance is appropriate.
annotation.recommended_action: inspect the actuator, linkage, and drive mechanism, correct the obstruction, and verify full travel before returning the actuator to automatic service

review.notes: Reviewed. The noncritical apparatus, available redundant path, stable process conditions, labels, and recommended action are supported by the report.
